protocol_override: User approved Codex/GPT self-judge instead of Gemini API.

parsed.signature_a: A computes a numeric grade value, given a letter-grade string, producing an integer defaulting for unknown grades.
parsed.signature_b: B computes formatted key-value lookups, given fixed string keys, producing strings and a map size.

same_problem.why: The programs compute different outputs or solve different requested tasks.

same_domain.why: Both operate on shared domain(s): integers, maps, strings.
